# FeeBook

> India's simplest fee tracker for tuition teachers and coaching institutes. Track partial cash payments, manage students, homework, attendance. No embarrassing auto-reminders. Free for 25 students.

## About FeeBook

FeeBook is a mobile-first web application built specifically for Indian tuition teachers, coaching instructors, and home tutors to manage their students' fees, attendance, and homework in one place.

Built by an 11th grade student in India, FeeBook understands the unique challenges of Indian teachers - like tracking partial cash payments, avoiding embarrassing auto-reminders to parents, and managing multiple batches of students.

## Key Features

- **Partial Fee Tracking**: Track partial cash payments (₹500 today, ₹500 next week) - unique in the market
- **No Auto-Reminders**: Teachers control when to remind parents - via friendly WhatsApp messages
- **Homework Management**: Save daily homework and share to parents/students via WhatsApp with photos
- **Smart Attendance**: With built-in Indian holiday calendar and custom working days
- **Fee Receipts**: Generate professional fee receipts and share via WhatsApp instantly
- **Expense Tracking**: Track business expenses and see profit/loss
- **Monthly Reports**: Clean visual reports for each month
- **Offline Support**: Works without internet, syncs when online
- **Google & Email Login**: Multiple secure sign-in options

## Who It's For

- Home tuition teachers in India
- Coaching class instructors
- Small tuition centers
- Individual educators managing 5-100 students
- Teachers who use cash payments primarily
- Educators tired of complex enterprise software

## Pricing

- **Free Plan**: Up to 25 students, all basic features
- **Pro Plan**: ₹99/month, unlimited students, full history, report export

## Why FeeBook is Different

Unlike competitors like Classplus (₹499+/month) or Teachmint (payment gateway forced), FeeBook:
- Free for real (25 students free, not 3-day trial)
- Handles cash payments (most Indian teachers use cash)
- Handles partial payments (most apps only show Paid/Unpaid)
- No forced auto-reminders (respects teacher-parent relationship)
- Made by a teenager who understands modern UX

## Technical Details

- **Platform**: Progressive Web App (PWA)
- **Works on**: Any smartphone browser (Android, iOS), also desktop
- **Install**: Add to home screen from browser
- **Languages**: English (Hindi coming soon)
- **Offline**: Yes, syncs when online
- **Data Security**: Supabase backend with Row Level Security

## Contact

- **Website**: https://feebook.vercel.app
- **Support**: frankmanvideo@gmail.com
- **WhatsApp Support**: +91 99738 98852
- **Built by**: An 11th grade student in India 🇮🇳

## Common Use Cases

1. **Small tuition teacher (5-15 students)**: Track who paid this month, send WhatsApp reminders to those who haven't
2. **Coaching class (50+ students)**: Manage multiple batches, track partial payments, generate reports
3. **Home tutor**: Simple student list, monthly fee tracking, homework sharing
4. **Music/dance instructor**: Track class attendance, monthly fees, communicate with parents

## FAQs

**Q: Is FeeBook really free?**
A: Yes, up to 25 students. No credit card needed.

**Q: Does it work offline?**
A: Yes, all data saves locally and syncs when online.

**Q: Can I export data?**
A: Pro plan allows WhatsApp export. Coming soon: Excel/PDF export.

**Q: Is my data safe?**
A: Yes, encrypted storage with Supabase, RLS policies ensure only you see your data.

**Q: How do I upgrade to Pro?**
A: Email frankmanvideo@gmail.com — manual activation (developer is a minor, so no payment gateway yet).
